headline: Comcast Refocuses Peacock On US As Broadband Shifts Test Valuation
summary: Comcast is concentrating its Peacock streaming efforts on the US market, stepping back from wider international ambitions. The company is also seeing meaningful shifts in its core internet business as fiber, wireless, and satellite options gain traction and cord cutting 2.0 continues. For investors watching NasdaqGS:CMCSA, this turn toward a US-only focus for Peacock sits alongside a mixed share performance record. The stock is trading at $31.91, with an 8.0% return year to date and a 6.0%...

headline: Comcast Completes Network Expansion to Residents in Clark County
summary: BATTLE GROUND, Wash., March 09, 2026--Comcast today announced that it has completed the expansion of its network in Clark County. As a part of a partnership with Clark County, Comcast’s network expansion project brings reliable, high-speed, symmetrical Internet from America’s smartest and most reliable converged network to nearly 500 homes in the area of the county that lies northeast of Battle Ground Lake.

headline: Comcast Business Delivers Connectivity at THE PLAYERS Championship, Deploys Targeted WiFi 7 in High-Impact Fan Zones
summary: PHILADELPHIA, March 09, 2026--Comcast Business today announced it is again serving as the connectivity backbone of THE PLAYERS Championship at The Stadium Course at TPC Sawgrass, powering on-course operations, deploying targeted WiFi 7 across the tournament's highest-traffic fan zones, and providing the dedicated network infrastructure that supports NBC Sports' national broadcast coverage of one of golf's most-watched events.

headline: How Investors May Respond To Comcast (CMCSA) Expanding US Broadband Reach And Strengthening Media Footprint
summary: In recent weeks, Comcast has expanded its multi-gigabit Xfinity network to more than 3,500 new homes and businesses in Bradford County, Florida, opened its 10th Xfinity Store in Broward County, and appointed Gordon Smith to its Board and Audit Committee. These moves, alongside Peacock’s growing US subscriber base and improving wireless performance, highlight Comcast’s push to deepen domestic connectivity and media relationships while competition in broadband intensifies. We’ll now examine...
